title: CG-100 Compositional Generalization Battery Item
description: Schema for one question in the CG-100 (Compositional Generalization) battery. Each item tests systematic recombination of known primitives into novel compositions. Three levels (CG1 lexical, CG2 structural, CG3 productive) across five domains.

level.description: CG1: lexical (new entities in known structures). CG2: structural (known entities in novel combinations). CG3: productive (recursive/unbounded composition).

domain.description: lang = language/grammar; logic = deduction; narrative = story/character; science = natural world; social = social/moral reasoning.

training_context.description: Description of the prior knowledge the being is assumed to have.

novel_composition.description: Why this question is novel given the training context.

expected_behavior.description: All CG-100 items expect the being to answer (no refusal cases).
